title: ARRIVAL Protocol: AI-to-AI Coordination Through Structured Semantic Atoms
description: Source code, experimental data, and documentation for the ARRIVAL Protocol — a structured multi-agent coordination framework that enables cross-architecture LLM ensembles to solve graduate-level scientific questions. Includes 539+ experiments across 9 LLM architectures, MEANING-CRDT v1.1 mathematical framework, echo-chamber analysis, adversarial robustness testing, and memory persistence modules. Total experimental cost: under $10.
notes: Documentation is bilingual (English/Russian). Code is licensed under AGPL-3.0-or-later; documentation under CC BY-NC 4.0.
